description: Math finite/special fixture wave-03 classifies atan/asin finite aliases and complex base-10 logarithm outputs with structured logs, without recording fenv state, raw errno storage, host long-double ABI values, f128 ABI values, host complex ABI return registers, addresses, timestamps, stderr, or process-global counters.
spec_reference: C11 7.12 math functions and glibc finite-alias compatibility for __asinl_finite, __atan2_finite, __atan2f128_finite, __atan2f_finite, __atan2l_finite, __atanh_finite, __atanhf128_finite, __atanhf_finite, __atanhl_finite, __clog10, __clog10f, __clog10l

cases.name: asinl_finite_mapped_positive_strict
cases.spec_section: long-double asin finite alias, covered as FrankenLibC f64-mapped compatibility
cases.note: No host long-double ABI claim; this fixture covers the documented f64 mapping.

cases.name: asinl_finite_mapped_positive_hardened
cases.spec_section: long-double asin finite alias, covered as FrankenLibC f64-mapped compatibility
cases.note: No host long-double ABI claim; this fixture covers the documented f64 mapping.
